śubhā
1 Lustre, light.
2 Beauty.
3 Desire.
4 Yellow pigment.
5 The Śamī tree.
6 An assembly of gods.
7 Dūrvā grass.
8 Bamboomanna.
9 The Priyaṅgu creeper.
